238.issue_title: Implement three-unity architecture for create_issue tool

cycles.name: C1 — Remove IssueBody and _render_body from CreateIssueTool
deliverables: CreateIssueInput.body is str, required, no default
JinjaRenderer, introspect_template_with_inheritance, compute_version_hash, get_template_root imports removed
mypy and pylint pass on mcp_server/tools/issue_tools.py
cycles.exit_criteria: CreateIssueTool accepts body: str; grep for IssueBody and _render_body in production code returns zero hits outside files scheduled for C2 update; quality gates pass on changed file

cycles.name: C2 — Delete and update affected test files
deliverables: grep for IssueBody and _render_body in tests/ returns zero hits
cycles.exit_criteria: Full test suite green; no IssueBody or _render_body references remain anywhere in the test suite; quality gates pass on all changed test files

cycles.name: C3 — Fix H1 duplicate in issue.md.jinja2
deliverables: issue.md.jinja2 markdown_header block does not render a # H1 line
Rendered output does not start with # <title>
Summary still renders when summary is provided
cycles.exit_criteria: scaffold_artifact(artifact_type='issue') output contains no markdown H1 line; existing scaffold tests remain green; validate_template passes
